name: Barbecued Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Drain beans and place in an ungreased 3-quart bean pot or casserole.
3. Mix in all remaining ingredients.
4. Cover tightly (use a double thickness of foil if the casserole has no lid).
5. Bake for 5 to 6 hours, stirring occasionally until beans are tender and sauce thickens.
6. If the mixture gets too dry before the beans are done, stir in a little warm water.
